phases.focusDescription: Build VO2max ceiling with uphill RunningIntervals
phases.notes: Least specific to 100-mile racing; develop early

phases.focusDescription: Raise lactate threshold with TempoRun repeats; prep for Sean O'Brien 50K
phases.notes: Hardest phase - balance volume and intensity

phases.focusDescription: Build race-specific aerobic power with SteadyStateRuns; prep for Mt. Disappointment
phases.notes: Increase long run duration; back-to-back weekends

phases.focusDescription: Race-specific endurance; peak volume; course simulation; heat acclimatization
phases.notes: Most specific to AC100. Sauna protocol for heat adaptation.
Reduce volume 40-50%; maintain one SSR session for sharpness

weeklySchedules.notes: First week of TempoRun phase. Hardest workouts at the start.
